title: Successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., testuser@example.com)
Enter a password of at least 8 characters (e.g., Password123)
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: User receives a confirmation message or is redirected to a success page
New account is stored in the system with the provided email and password

title: Account creation with duplicate email is rejected
preconditions: An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter the email address 'existing@example.com'
Enter a valid password (e.g., Password123)
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use

title: Account creation with password shorter than 8 characters is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., newuser@example.com)
Enter a password of 7 characters or less (e.g., Pass123)
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long

title: Account creation with password exactly 8 characters
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., boundary@example.com)
Enter a password of exactly 8 characters (e.g., Pass1234)
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: User receives a confirmation message or is redirected to a success page
New account is stored in the system with the provided email and password

title: Account creation with password of 7 characters is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., boundary7@example.com)
Enter a password of exactly 7 characters (e.g., Pass123)
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long

title: Account creation with password of 9 characters
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., boundary9@example.com)
Enter a password of exactly 9 characters (e.g., Pass12345)
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: User receives a confirmation message or is redirected to a success page
New account is stored in the system with the provided email and password

title: Account creation with empty email field is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Leave the email field empty
Enter a valid password of at least 8 characters (e.g., Password123)
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that email is required

title: Account creation with empty password field is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., emptypwd@example.com)
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that password is required

title: Account creation with very long password (boundary testing)
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., longpwd@example.com)
Enter a password of 100 characters (e.g., a string of 100 characters)
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: User receives a confirmation message or is redirected to a success page
New account is stored in the system with the provided email and password

title: Account creation with email containing special characters (if allowed by system)
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter an email address with special characters (e.g., user+tag@example.com)
Enter a valid password of at least 8 characters (e.g., Password123)
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account is created successfully if special characters are allowed
If not allowed, an appropriate error message is displayed

title: Account creation with duplicate email using different case (case-insensitivity check)
preconditions: An existing account with email 'Existing@Example.com' already exists in the system
User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter the email address 'existing@example.com' (different case)
Enter a valid password (e.g., Password123)
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use

title: Account creation with email missing '@' symbol is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter an email address without '@' symbol (e.g., invalidemail.com)
Enter a valid password of at least 8 characters (e.g., Password123)
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the email format is invalid

title: Account creation with email missing domain part is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter an email address without domain (e.g., user@)
Enter a valid password of at least 8 characters (e.g., Password123)
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the email format is invalid

title: Account creation with email missing local part is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter an email address without local part (e.g., @domain.com)
Enter a valid password of at least 8 characters (e.g., Password123)
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the email format is invalid

title: Account creation with email containing spaces is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter an email address with spaces (e.g., user @domain.com)
Enter a valid password of at least 8 characters (e.g., Password123)
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: An error message is displayed indicating that the email format is invalid
